name: Switching between two active assistant threads
description: User has two parallel conversations going — one for the Patel fence, one for the Browning paint. Switching threads in the sidebar should preserve scroll position, draft compose text, and not bleed messages between threads.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Multitasking between two prospects who texted within 10 minutes of each other.

preconditions: Two existing threads: 'Patel fence' (15 messages), 'Browning paint' (4 messages)
User is viewing the Patel thread

steps.action: Scrolls halfway up the Patel thread, then types but doesn't send 'add staining' in the composer

steps.expect: Loads Browning thread; composer is empty (Browning's own draft state, not Patel's)

steps.action: Sends a message in Browning, then clicks back to Patel
steps.expect: Patel scroll position restored; the unsent 'add staining' draft is still in the composer

evaluationCriteria.check: Active thread in sidebar is unmistakably highlighted
Switching feels instant on cached threads — no full re-fetch flash
Per-thread draft state is in localStorage or equivalent; survives a tab reload, scoped per thread
Sidebar items are real links/buttons; arrow-key navigation works across thread list
